summary: Iteration 25 - Marcos (Videomaker) Sora 2 Video Feature Testing Complete. All tests PASS. The new video generation agent 'Marcos' has been successfully integrated into the pipeline as the 5th step (after Rafael, before Pedro). Backend step labels API returns correct marcos_video data. Frontend AI Studio displays 6 agents with correct order and Film icon for Marcos.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marcos Videomaker agent fully integrated. Pipeline has 6 steps. Video generation uses Sora 2 and takes 2-5 minutes (not tested due to cost). Video player UI is implemented with proper test IDs.

backend_pipeline_list.notes: Returns pipelines with marcos_video step data

backend_step_labels.notes: Returns marcos_video with agent='Marcos', role='Videomaker', icon='film'

frontend_ai_studio_agents.notes: All 6 agents visible in intro bar with correct icons

frontend_step_meta.notes: STEP_META includes marcos_video with Film icon (red color)

frontend_generating_video_badge.notes: Badge shows when marcos_video step is generating (code verified)

frontend_video_player_step_content.notes: Video player renders in StepContent when data.video_url exists

frontend_completed_summary_video_tab.notes: Video tab appears conditionally when video_url exists

frontend_final_preview_video.notes: FinalPreview displays video player when marcos_video has video_url

backend_pipeline_py.STEP_LABELS: marcos_video: {agent: Marcos, role: Videomaker, icon: film}

frontend_final_preview.video_display: Conditional video player with download link

mocked_apis.notes: Sora 2 integration is real but not tested due to cost/time (2-5 minutes per video)
